description_long: This is a vintage-style sedan with a streamlined, rounded body and pronounced fenders, reminiscent of classic American cars from the 1930s or 1940s. The exterior is finished in a dark, weathered brown with visible rust and patina, giving it an aged, antique appearance. The car features an open-top design with two rows of seats, separated by a central divider, and a prominent, ribbed front grille flanked by large, circular headlights. The wheels are partially covered by the fenders, and the side profile reveals a long hood and a short rear deck. The interior appears to be simple, with minimal visible controls or instrumentation. The overall design suggests a collectible or decorative piece rather than a modern, functional vehicle.
description: A weathered, vintage open-top sedan with a dark, rusted finish, rounded fenders, and a ribbed front grille. The car has an antique, classic design with visible patina and minimal interior details.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the trunk area, rounded fenders, and the open seating arrangement.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the long hood, open cabin, and pronounced fenders.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the ribbed grille, large round headlights, and curved front bumper.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with clear visibility of the open seating and rear fender.
